name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Peekaboo ICONIC Capsule Series
A stunning handmade bag series that captivates the eye, Italian original grain calf leather, paired with fully imported custom wax thread pure handmade outer stitching, classic selleria stitching, top-tier French original water-based oil edges, perfectly combined by hand, comes with two shoulder straps, can be carried or crossbody, a super heavy-craftsmanship classic piece!
Small size 23/12/18cm
